# Let's open the file and display its contents with indices for analysis.
path = "/mnt/data/file-XHpU1MU69z9CHyhTV8vXNF-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

len(text), text[:5000]

# Find all positions of unescaped double quotes and extract spans
positions = [i for i,c in enumerate(text) if c == '"']
len(positions), positions[:20]

# Pair them sequentially (assume proper pairs)
pairs = list(zip(positions[::2], positions[1::2]))
spans = []
for i,(start_quote, end_quote) in enumerate(pairs):
    span_start = start_quote+1
    span_end = end_quote  # exclusive for Python slicing, but we need inclusive end index later
    content = text[span_start:span_end]
    context_start = max(0, start_quote-80)
    context_end = min(len(text), end_quote+80)
    context = text[context_start:context_end]
    spans.append((i, start_quote, end_quote, span_start, span_end, content, context))

len(spans)

# Display each with indices and content length and show preceding context phrase
for i, sq, eq, ss, se, content, context in spans:
    print(f"Span {i}: quotes at [{sq}, {eq}], content indices [{ss}, {se-1}] len={len(content)}")
    print("Content:", content)
    print("Context:", context.replace("\n"," "))
    print("="*80)

# Build the JSON structure
def classify(i, context):
    # Determine classification based on context following the quote
    # If surah with colon present in the nearby context just after end_quote, classify as Aya.
    # Else if "رواه" present classify as Hadeeth
    # Else use presence of "يقول الله" vs "حديث النبي"
    if "):" in context:  # not helpful
        pass
    ctx = context
    if "رواه" in ctx:
        return "Hadeeth"
    if "(" in ctx and ":" in ctx:  # looks like (الإسراء: 71)
        return "Aya"
    # fallback by earlier context before quote
    return "Aya" if "يقول الله" in ctx or "القرآن الكريم" in ctx else "Hadeeth"

citations = []
for i, sq, eq, ss, se, content, context in spans:
    # compute start inclusive and end inclusive
    entry = {
        "span_start": ss,
        "span_end": se-1,
        "span_text": content,
        "citation_type": classify(i, context)
    }
    citations.append(entry)

citations

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":161,"span_end":230,"span_text":"وَمَن يُشَاقِقِ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":361,"span_end":453,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ كَفَرَ وَجَاءَ بِالْحَقِ وَجَاءَ بِهِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":606,"span_end":678,"span_text":"لا يُحِبُّ المُؤْمِنُ لِأَخِيهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فِعلَ مُحَمَدٍ وَلا خِلَافَهُ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":821,"span_end":963,"span_text":"لا تُؤَمِّلوا الْمُؤَمِّلَاتِ وَلا تُحِبُّوا الْمُحِبَّاتِ وَلا تَكُفُّوا الْمُكَفِّفَاتِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1103,"span_end":1150,"span_text":"لا يُضُرُّكُمُ شَيءٌ حَتّى تُضَرُّوا أَنفُسَكُمْ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1293,"span_end":1412,"span_text":"وَالَّذِينَ جَاؤُوا مِن بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَزَيِّنَ وَجْهَنَا لِلْيَوْمِ الْأَخِرِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1554,"span_end":1606,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1746,"span_end":1798,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1938,"span_end":1990,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":2130,"span_end":2182,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
